effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the up-to-two Basic, <=70 HP, open-Bench-slot, deck-to-Bench, and shuffle semantics
effects.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon with 70 HP or less and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the opponent-Bench gust selector
effects.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits opponent-selected discard-until-three
effects.text: Your opponent discards cards from their hand until they have 3 cards in their hand.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the non-Rule-Box Pokémon filter, reveal, hidden-deck fail-to-find allowance, and shuffle
effects.text: Search your deck for a Pokémon that doesn’t have a Rule Box, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. (Pokémon {ex}, Pokémon {V}, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the separately capped Evolution-Pokémon and Energy searches, reveal, and shared shuffle
effects.text: Search your deck for an Evolution Pokémon and an Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the exact discard-to-hand Pokémon-or-Basic-Energy union
effects.text: Put a Pokémon or a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits hand replacement and the exact-six-Prizes 8-versus-6 draw branch
effects.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards. If you have exactly 6 Prize cards remaining, draw 8 cards instead.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits Rare Candy's exact Basic-to-matching-Stage-2 relation and both timing prohibitions
effects.text: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card onto the Basic Pokémon to evolve it, skipping the Stage 1. You can’t use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits three independent stage-filtered searches, reveal, and shuffle
effects.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon, a Stage 1 Pokémon, and a Stage 2 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the shared up-to-three cap and exact non-Rule-Box-Pokémon/Basic-Energy discard union
effects.text: Put up to 3 in any combination of Pokémon that don’t have a Rule Box and Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand. (Pokémon {ex}, Pokémon {V}, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the opponent-side attached Special Energy selector and discard
effects.text: Discard a Special Energy from 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the up-to-five Pokémon discard-to-deck movement and shuffle
effects.text: Shuffle up to 5 Pokémon from your discard pile into your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits Hero's Cape's +100 effective maximum HP
effects.text: The Pokémon this card is attached to gets +100 HP.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits top-seven inspection, optional Supporter selection/reveal, and rest-to-deck shuffle
effects.text: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Supporter card you find there and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the existing stat bake exactly preserves +1 Colorless attack cost for every Tera Pokémon on both sides

current_encoder.reason: current encoder represents only reviewed stat bakes

effects.text: Attacks used by each Tera Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent’s) cost {C} more.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the damaged-Active and at-least-three-attached-Energy gate for healing 80
effects.text: Heal 80 damage from your Active Pokémon that has 3 or more Energy attached.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the Bench-only, counter-only, opponent-Pokémon attack-or-Ability prevention boundary
effects.text: Prevent all damage counters from being placed on Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s) by effects of attacks and Abilities from the opponent’s Pokémon. (Damage from attacks is still taken.)

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the own Active/Bench switch selector
effects.text: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits both discard-until-five calculations and opponent-first resolution order
effects.text: Each player discards cards from their hand until they have 5 cards in their hand. Your opponent discards first. (If a player has 5 or fewer cards in their hand, they do not discard.)

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the prior-turn own-Pokémon KO gate and asymmetric 5/2 hand replacement
effects.formula_question: legal iff KO history is true; then replace hands with owner 5/opponent 2
effects.text:
You can use this card only if any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent’s last turn.

Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 2 cards.

formula_queue.question: legal iff KO history is true; then replace hands with owner 5/opponent 2
